verses.1: In you, LORD, I take refuge.
verses.2: Deliver me in your righteousness, and rescue me.
verses.3: Be to me a rock of refuge to which I may always go.
verses.4: Rescue me, my God, from the hand of the wicked,
verses.5: For you are my hope, Lord GOD,
verses.6: I have relied on you from the womb.
verses.7: I am a marvel to many,
verses.8: My mouth shall be filled with your praise,
verses.9: Don’t reject me in my old age.
verses.10: For my enemies talk about me.
verses.12: God, don’t be far from me.
verses.13: Let my accusers be disappointed and consumed.
verses.15: My mouth will tell about your righteousness,
verses.16: I will come with the mighty acts of the Lord GOD.
verses.17: God, you have taught me from my youth.
verses.18: Yes, even when I am old and gray-haired, God, don’t forsake me,
verses.19: God, your righteousness also reaches to the heavens.
verses.20: You, who have shown us many and bitter troubles,
verses.22: I will also praise you with the harp for your faithfulness, my God.
verses.23: My lips shall shout for joy!
verses.24: My tongue will also talk about your righteousness all day long,
